race.comment: INSPIRATIONAL LASS (10) is a three-year-old filly who is having her first run for the Clinton Taylor yard. Finished off last campaign with an eighth at Kyneton four months ago. Not seen at the trials but is in a nice race and is a key chance who will go close. MY BOY LOLLIPOP (4) was in the money two starts back at Nyngan then missed the frame but was not too far away last time over 1000m at Binnaway. Has the addition of blinkers. Not far off a win and rates highly on his best form. MOOCHI STARLIGHT (2) resumes from a spell of five months. Could only manage to finish fourth at the latest run over 1050m at Rockhampton. Should present well following a recent trial win and rates a solid top-three hope. GUNNIE GUNFIGHTER (1) best of the rest while fresh.
